svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="zFSXX9l_HGTQPlYaM2qk"> <mxGraphModel dx="1414" dy="789" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml

left to right direction

actor Guest
actor \"Registered User\" as User
actor \"Payment System\" as Payment
actor \"Delivery Service\" as Delivery

rectangle \"Online Store System\" {

 usecase \"Register\" as UC1
 usecase \"Login\" as UC2
 usecase \"Browse Products\" as UC3
 usecase \"Search Products\" as UC4
 usecase \"Filter Products\" as UC5
 usecase \"View Product Details\" as UC6
 usecase \"Manage Cart\" as UC7
 usecase \"Checkout\" as UC8
 usecase \"Select Payment Method\" as UC9
 usecase \"Pay for Order\" as UC10
 usecase \"Track Orders\" as UC11
 usecase \"Cancel Order\" as UC12
 usecase \"Split Order\" as UC13
 usecase \"Select Pickup Point\" as UC14
 usecase \"Logout\" as UC15
}

Guest --> UC1
Guest --> UC2
Guest --> UC3

User --> UC3
User --> UC4
User --> UC5
User --> UC6
User --> UC7
User --> UC8
User --> UC11
User --> UC12
User --> UC13
User --> UC14
User --> UC15

UC8 .> UC9 : <<include>>
UC8 .> UC10 : <<include>>

Payment --> UC10
Delivery --> UC11

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="naWego9NmsAjT3LDJ12C-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1037" width="433" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

svg.style: width: 433px; height: 1037px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: initial;
